overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a nighttime walk through a muddy Old West town. The character moves along a wooden porch past a saloon, enters the main street, approaches a body lying in the mud, and continues past riders on horseback. The scene features warm lamplight illuminating wooden buildings under a dark sky.

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden porch, glancing through the saloon window at patrons inside

notable_agents.action: woman in a dress walking toward and entering the saloon doorway

entered.detail: large window with multiple panes showing the warm interior of the saloon
weathered wooden planks of the sidewalk
warm glowing lantern mounted on the building exterior
interior visible through window with tables, chairs, and patrons

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view through a saloon window into a warmly lit interior. The camera moves along a wooden porch, passing a woman entering the building. The setting is a covered wooden sidewalk with hanging lanterns providing warm illumination against the night.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden sidewalk with barber pole and hitching post

events.description: moving from the covered wooden porch onto the muddy street

agents.ego_description: walking past a man leaning against the saloon wall and continuing toward the street

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and hat leaning against the building wall, drinking from a bottle

entered.detail: red and white striped barber pole mounted on a wooden post
brown horse with saddle tied to a hitching post
wet muddy road with wagon tracks illuminated by street lamps

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the porch past a man drinking against the wall, approaching a barber pole and a hitched horse. Around 16 seconds, the scene transitions from the covered porch to the open muddy street, revealing more of the town's wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open muddy main street of western town

events.description: discovering a body lying face-down in the muddy street

agents.ego_description: walking through the muddy street toward a body lying on the ground

entered.detail: person lying face-down in the mud, wearing blue clothing
tall church steeple visible against the night sky in the distance
two figures on horses approaching from down the street

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open muddy street, the camera approaches a body lying in the mud. The town opens up to show a church steeple in the distance and riders on horseback approaching. The lighting comes from street lamps casting warm glows on the wet ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy street at ground level near fallen body

events.description: camera drops to ground level, focusing on the muddy texture of the street

agents.ego_description: moving past the body and lowering to inspect the muddy ground closely

notable_agents.action: riders on horseback passing by the body in the street

entered.detail: close-up view of wet mud with wagon wheel ruts and footprints

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the body and drops to ground level, showing a close-up of the muddy street texture. Riders on horseback pass by in the background as the perspective shifts to a low angle, emphasizing the wet, rutted mud of the town street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sheltered warmth of a saloon porch into the cold, open expanse of a muddy town street at night. It begins by glancing through a saloon window into a lit interior before gliding along a covered wooden sidewalk illuminated by hanging lanterns. As the camera passes a man leaning against the wall and a hitched horse, the perspective shifts from the overhead cover of the porch out into the open, wet air of the main thoroughfare. The scene then expands to reveal a distant church steeple and approaching riders, moving toward a body lying in the mud under the warm glow of street lamps. Finally, the camera drops to ground level, shifting to a low angle that emphasizes the rutted, wet texture of the muddy street as riders pass by in the background.
